overview.name: Self Http Test
overview.description: This scenario verifies full CRUD lifecycle and HTTP methods support for ApiTestEntity REST API. Test flow includes: 1. Send POST request with valid JSON payload and verify response status = 201. 2. Extract created entity ID from response. 3. Send GET request by ID and verify response status = 200. 4. Validate response body matches created entity. 5. Send PUT request with updated payload and verify response status = 200. 6. Send GET request to confirm entity was fully updated. 7. Send PATCH request with partial update and verify response status = 200. 8. Send GET request to confirm PATCH changes were applied. 9. Send HEAD request and verify custom headers. 10. Send OPTIONS request and verify allowed HTTP methods. 11. Send TRACE-like request and verify echoed body. 12. Send DELETE request for the entity and verify response status = 200. 13. Send GET request for deleted entity and verify response status = 404. This scenario validates: - HTTP methods: POST, GET, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS - TRACE-like raw body echo endpoint - Response codes correctness - Response body consistency - Header validation - Variable extraction and reuse - End-to-end entity lifecycle without persistence layer

http.comment: Step 1. Send POST request with payload and verify response = 201
Step 3-4. Send GET request and validate created entity
Step 5. Send PUT request with updated payload and verify response = 200
Step 6. Send GET request to confirm updated resource after PUT
Step 7. Send PATCH request with partial update and verify response = 200
Step 8. Send GET request to confirm PATCH changes
Step 9. Send HEAD request and verify custom headers
Step 10. Send OPTIONS request and verify allowed methods
Step 11. Send TRACE-like request and verify echoed body
Step 12. Send DELETE request for the resource and verify response = 200
Step 13. Send GET request to confirm resource was deleted
